def positive_cursor_based_pagination_missing_stable_sort_tiebreaker():
    rule_id = "cursor_based_pagination_missing_stable_sort_tiebreaker"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Cursor-based pagination implemented without a stable unique sort key tiebreaker."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
